Public Class ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfile Implements IJsonModel(Of ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfile), IPersistableModel(Of ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfile)

Docs.summary: Azure Monitor addon profiles for monitoring the managed cluster.

MemberSignature.Value: public ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfile ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfileAppMonitoring AppMonitoring { get; set; }

Public Property AppMonitoring As ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfileAppMonitoring
member this.AppMonitoring : Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterAzureMonitorProfileAppMonitoring with get, set

Docs.summary: Application Monitoring Profile for Kubernetes Application Container. Collects application logs, metrics and traces through auto-instrumentation of the application using Azure Monitor OpenTelemetry based SDKs. See aka.ms/AzureMonitorApplicationMonitoring for an overview.

Docs.summary: Azure Monitor Container Insights Profile for Kubernetes Events, Inventory and Container stdout & stderr logs etc. See aka.ms/AzureMonitorContainerInsights for an overview.

.property instance class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterMonitorProfileMetrics Metrics
Public Property Metrics As ManagedClusterMonitorProfileMetrics
member this.Metrics : Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterMonitorProfileMetrics with get, set

Docs.summary: Metrics profile for the Azure Monitor managed service for Prometheus addon. Collect out-of-the-box Kubernetes infrastructure metrics to send to an Azure Monitor Workspace and configure additional scraping for custom targets. See aka.ms/AzureManagedPrometheus for an overview.
